channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cassidy reflects on his impeachment vote after losing Senate seat
item.description: Senator Bill Cassidy defended his vote to impeach former President Donald Trump, calling it a privilege to uphold the Constitution.

item.title: Boebert praises Massie as a principled conservative
item.description: Representative Lauren Boebert defended Representative Thomas Massie on Newsmax ahead of his primary, calling him a principled constitutional conservative.

item.title: High taxes in blue states push residents toward Republican-led southern states
item.description: The growing fiscal divide between red and blue states is influencing migration as states compete for residents with different tax policies.

item.title: New border data reveals full extent of Biden administration's crisis
